global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with various shapes and text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel booking service with a special offer.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A large, soft-edged circular shape in a lighter orange hue, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A medium-sized square shape in a lighter orange hue, also centrally positioned.

elements.label: Small logo element
elements.description: A small logo element located at the top left, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent button with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Order now' in bold.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape in a lighter hue, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text at the top stating 'HorizonHop UGC' in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Text at the bottom that reads 'Escape this weekend Hotels + flights in one tap' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: Text displaying the price '€29.99' in a prominent, bold font at the bottom.
